title: elvira repens
intro: Elvira repens, also known as creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It is used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and antiseptic properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The medicinal properties of Elvira repens include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and support immune function, making it a valuable remedy for colds, flu, and other upper respiratory infections. Elvira repens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
